title: RIO HITL Proxy — API Playbook
description: Copy-paste ready API calls for the full Human-in-the-Loop flow. Run steps in order.

steps.name: Onboard a proxy user
steps.notes: Creates the proxy user bound to the system seed + policy. Run once per userId.

steps.name: Create a LOW risk intent (no approval needed)
steps.notes: echo is LOW risk. approvalRequired will be false. Save the intentId.

steps.name: Execute the LOW risk intent directly
steps.notes: No approvalId needed for LOW risk. Should return SUCCESS immediately.

steps.name: Create a HIGH risk intent (send email)

toolArgs.subject: RIO HITL Test
toolArgs.body: This email was sent via the RIO HITL proxy after human approval.

steps.notes: send_email is HIGH risk. approvalRequired will be true. Save the intentId.

steps.name: Human Root approves the intent
steps.notes: Creates an Ed25519-signed approval bound to the exact tool + args hash. Expires in 5 minutes. Max 1 execution.

steps.name: Execute the approved HIGH risk intent
steps.notes: Runs 8 preflight checks before executing. On second call returns APPROVAL_EXHAUSTED.

steps.name: Human Root rejects an intent
steps.notes: Sets intent status to REJECTED. No execution possible.

steps.name: Check status for a user
steps.notes: Returns proxy user state, last 10 intents, last 10 approvals.

steps.name: View the audit ledger
steps.notes: Returns last 100 ledger entries (most recent first). Every action has a SHA-256 hash chained to the previous entry.

steps.name: Kill switch — emergency stop
steps.notes: Immediately revokes all active approvals. All future intent creation and execution returns PROXY_KILLED (403). Irreversible.

invariants.P-HUMAN-ROOT-ONLY-YES: No HIGH or MEDIUM tool execution without explicit human approval
invariants.P-ALL-ACTIONS-LEDGERED: Every action is written to the tamper-evident SHA-256 hash chain
invariants.P-KILL-IS-GLOBAL: Kill switch immediately blocks all execution and revokes all approvals
invariants.P-APPROVAL-BOUND: Approvals are cryptographically bound to tool + argsHash + expiry + maxExecutions
